history.text: Nicaragua became independent from New Spain, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Nicaragua became independent from the First Mexican Empire, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Nicaragua became independent from the Federal Republic of Central America, marking a key step in modern statehood.
The Nicaraguan Revolution reshaped Nicaragua's political life.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Nicaragua.

worthSeeing.title: Ometepe Island:
worthSeeing.text: A figure-eight island of two volcanoes rising from Lake Nicaragua.

worthSeeing.title: Granada Colonial City:
worthSeeing.text: The oldest continuously inhabited city in Central America, on the lake shore.

worthSeeing.title: Laguna de Apoyo:
worthSeeing.text: A perfect circular crater lake with warm clear water and a nature reserve.
